creator: smurf.daemon@mail.smurfd.me
text:
Hey,
first bug report here, so please let me know if i tagged it wrong or such.
After a recent "pkg update && pkg upgrade" windowmaker stopped running on freebsd 14.1 (not on 13.3, 13.4)

in .xinitrc i have: exec /usr/local/bin/wmaker

Error recieved when running: "startx"
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libwraster.so.6: version LIBWRASTER7 required by /usr/local/bin/wmaker not defined

Thanks in advance.
of course, if you need more info, let me know
